_comment: Generated from mainDiagram.puml. Crystal recipe costs use only ExpeditionPoint. Completion rewards grant the PUML Reward value as ExpeditionPoint plus one crystal for every outgoing progression arrow. Branching unlocks were moved to CompletionRewards.Random so only one next crystal is awarded per completion when an expedition has multiple outgoing paths.
_category_note: Categories manually sorted into Surface, Underground, Forest, Ocean, Desert, Ice, Fire, Jungle, Mystic, and Dungeon. Dungeon is reserved for generator dungeon entries.
